name: google-workspace-cli
description: CLI tool for managing Google Workspace resources dynamically using Discovery APIs.

settings.name: Credentials File
settings.description: Path to the Google Workspace authorized user credentials or service account JSON file.

settings.name: Sanitize Template
settings.description: Resource name of the Model Armor template to use for sanitization (e.g., projects/P/locations/L/templates/T).

settings.name: Impersonated User
settings.description: Email address of the user to impersonate (requires Domain-Wide Delegation).
